scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --input-type=module -e "import { mkdirSync, copyFileSync } from 'node:fs'; mkdirSync('dist/setup',{recursive:true}); copyFileSync('src/setup/setup.html','dist/setup/setup.html'); copyFileSync('src/setup/setup-preload.cjs','dist/setup/setup-preload.cjs');"
